description_long: This is a black cap with a playful, cat-inspired design, featuring two pointed ear-like protrusions on the crown. The front displays a stylized face with yellow and pink lines forming eyes and a mouth, along with two circular badges—one with a cat face and another with a star. The cap is accented by two parallel stripes, one pink and one yellow, running from the front to the back on each side. On the left side of the brim, there are two metallic rings attached, adding a unique urban flair. The overall shape is rounded and soft, with a slightly extended brim and a smooth, matte finish.
description: A black cat-themed cap with pointed ears, colorful stripes, face graphics, and metallic rings on the brim.
description_view_0: Front view shows the cat face graphic, two badges, and metallic rings on the left brim.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the ear shape, side stripes, and the metallic rings on the brim.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the two parallel colored stripes and the rounded back with ear shapes.
description_view_3: Right side view shows the ear shape, side stripes, and a partial view of the front badges and rings.
attribute_crown_shape: rounded with pointed cat ear protrusions
